tagline: An online voting system for Indian elections.

hero.title: Vote from anywhere. Verify everything.
hero.lede: A remote, auditable, accessible voting system for Indian elections — engineered for slow phones, weak networks and small towns.

features.title: Why this exists
features.sub: Built for the third of India that the polling booth misses.
features.f1_p: Eligible voters who cannot reach their home polling station get a credentialled remote channel.
features.f2_p: Every ballot returns a Merkle root receipt. Anyone can verify it against the public root.
features.f3_p: English and हिन्दी, screen-reader-first, keyboard-first, reduced-motion respected.
features.f4_p: Single container, asia-east1, sub-second cold start, idle cost zero.

auth.title: Sign in to vote
auth.sub: Enter your Voter ID. We will send a one-time password.
auth.demo_otp: For this demo your OTP is shown directly:

vote.title: Your ballot
vote.sub: Pick one candidate. You cannot change your vote after submission.
vote.confirm_body: You are about to vote for {name} ({party}). This is final and anonymous.
vote.submitted_body: Your ballot is sealed and your receipt is below. Save it to verify inclusion later.

results.title: Live results
results.sub: Recomputed on every request from the encrypted ballot box.
results.no_data: No ballots yet. Start by casting one.

audit.title: Public audit
audit.sub: Inspect the Merkle root, the latest leaves and recent ciphertext ballots.

admin.title: Admin console
admin.sub: SIEM-style operational view. Phase control, log feed, system stats.

common.powered: Built end-to-end on Cloud Run · scale-to-zero · asia-east1
common.by: Capstone of Ankit Saini · GF202215717 · B.Tech CSE Data Science · Shoolini University
